metadata.executive_summary: For Q1 2025, Alphabet reported revenues of $90.234 billion, a 12% year-over-year increase. Net income reached $34.540 billion, reflecting a 46% growth compared to Q1 2024. Diluted EPS was $2.81, up 49% from the previous year. The company achieved an income from operations of $30.606 billion, a 20% increase year-over-year. Other income (expense), net, significantly rose to $11.183 billion, marking a 293% increase. These results highlight Alphabet's strong financial performance and operational efficiency during the quarter.
